report.summary: Day 71 standup v12: Build-8 shipped SDP Guide (~720 lines) + Agentic Payments Protocols guide (~877 lines) — both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Design-v11 created 2 OG images + fixed critical StructuredData prop bugs on both new pages (JSON-LD was silently failing). Community-v10 drafted 5 posts (ETF $2.5B inflows, SOL outperformance, 740-page milestone, CLARITY Act complication, TACO Monday) + newsletter v20 + 2 SVG cards. Publish-v5 promoted Tokenized Treasuries + Funding Rate Tracker (queue emptied, then refilled by build). EOD-v11 confirmed 494 published slugs, 762 uncommitted items. BTC $71,043-71,750 (+4%), F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46-47). Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap ~179 pages. 57 agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v11: 5 agents ran (build-8, community-v10, design-v11, eod-v11, publish-v5). 57 total runs today (standup×12, build×8, design×11, community×10, publish×5, eod×11).

BUILD-8 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Solana Developer Platform (SDP) Guide (~720 lines, covers 3 API modules, Mastercard/WU/Worldpay enterprise users, AI-native integration) + Agentic Payments Protocols Compared 2026 (~877 lines, covers x402/ACP/AP2/ERC-8183/Open Wallet Standard, layered protocol stack, side-by-side comparison). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN-v11 CRITICAL FIX: Found and fixed StructuredData component prop bugs on BOTH new pages — 'schema'/'schemas' used instead of 'data'. JSON-LD was silently not rendering, hurting SEO. Also fixed combineSchemas array-wrapping bug on SDP page. Created 2 OG images (SDP + Agentic Payments).

PUBLISH-v5: Promoted Tokenized Treasuries RWA Yield Guide + Funding Rate Tracker to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue emptied then refilled by build-8 with SDP + Agentic Payments. Vercel redeploy triggered (deployment 61BMaVntv) but still building from stale Mar 17 commit.

COMMUNITY-v10 OUTPUT: 5 social posts (BTC ETF $2.5B March inflows, SOL +6.48% SDP outperformance, 740-page milestone, CLARITY Act legislative complication, TACO Monday rally explainer) + newsletter v20 supplemental + 2 SVG cards + Discord/TG late-night update. Content calendar v24 scheduled Mar 24-27.
EOD-v11: +2 pages promoted (batch 12). 494 published slugs total. 762 uncommitted items (+4 from v10). 46 TS errors unchanged. Deploy drift now 7 days.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,043-71,750 holding above $71K (+4% relief rally). ETH ~$2,136-2,160 (+5%). SOL ~$90 (+6.48% best top-10). F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46-47). BTC ETFs $2.5B March inflows ($128B AUM, YTD outflows only $210M). NEW: Invesco taking over Superstate's $900M onchain tokenized Treasury fund. Solana SDP confirmed launched with sandbox on devnet. Macro: USD firmer, oil >$100, gold down 9 days, Treasury yields elevated.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v11: build-8 (SDP guide + Agentic Payments guide), design-v11 (2 OG images + StructuredData bug fixes), community-v10 (5 posts + newsletter v20 + 2 SVGs + Discord), publish-v5 (2 pages promoted + Vercel redeploy), eod-v11 (verification). 5 agents ran = $452 human-equivalent.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items (SDP guide, Agentic Payments guide). Build pipeline continuous — queue refilled within one cycle of draining. 59+ guides built, 63+ OG images, 126+ social posts, 50+ SVG cards, 20 newsletters.

TOTAL INVENTORY: 494 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~740 total pages in published set (including non-learn routes). 1,142 page.tsx files locally. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~179 pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) still present since Mar 16. 762 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes. All data routes unprotected.
BUG FIXED THIS CYCLE: StructuredData prop name mismatch on 2 pages — JSON-LD was silently failing. Design-v11 corrected to 'data' prop.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×12, build×8, design×11, community×10, publish×5, eod×11 = 57 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 179-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap now at ~179 pages (494 declared vs ~315 live). 8 days of content invisible to Google. BTC holding $71K + Extreme Fear Day 47 + Solana SDP launch + CLARITY Act Senate review + Invesco $900M tokenized Treasury = peak search demand across multiple verticals. One unlock + push = 57% content increase deployed instantly. Tax-Loss Harvesting guide has 3-week window before April 15 deadline closes. This is the single highest-ROI action available.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE SDP GUIDE + AGENTIC PAYMENTS: 2 new items in PUBLISH_QUEUE. SDP Guide captures today's #1 crypto story (Mastercard/WU/Worldpay on Solana) — search demand peaking NOW and decays fast. Agentic Payments guide positions us in the emerging AI-agent payments vertical (x402 at 115M+ txns, MoonPay Open Wallet Standard just launched yesterday). Promote both immediately — they're ready.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON TOKENIZED TREASURY MOMENTUM: Invesco taking over Superstate's $900M onchain fund is NEW since last cycle. Our Tokenized Treasuries RWA Yield Guide was just published — perfectly timed. Combined with SDP launch (WisdomTree + Ondo on Solana), RWA narrative is compounding. Ensure this guide is in the deploy batch and social content references it.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 57 agent runs producing $4,487 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Content velocity exceeds deploy capacity by 8 days. Two critical StructuredData bugs caught and fixed by design-v11 — highlights the value of the design audit cycle catching silent SEO failures that build/scaffold miss. SDP + Agentic Payments guides position us at the intersection of institutional crypto adoption (Mastercard/WU/Worldpay) and AI-agent infrastructure — two of the most investable narratives in crypto right now. Critical path remains git locks → deploy.
